name: Drunken Chicken Salad
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut cooked chicken breasts in half.
2. Put the chicken in a large bowl.
3. Add wine, salt, and sugar to the bowl. Toss everything together.
4. Cover and refrigerate for 24 hours.
5. The next day, drain off the marinade.
6. Arrange lettuce leaves on a serving platter.
7. Place chicken pieces in the center of the platter.
8. Sprinkle with sesame seeds, cilantro leaves, and scallions.
